Founded during the reign of Nalwadi Krishnaraja Wadiyar, the brand is not merely a commercial product. For many Kannadigas, it is an aromatic symbol of heritage. Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) MP K Sudhakar accused the Congress-led Karnataka government of displaying what he called an “anti-Kannada mindset”.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/soap-opera-over-soap-why-karnataka-politics-is-in-a-lather-over-iconic-mysuru-brand/articleshow/128378314.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/soap-opera-over-soap-why-karnataka-politics-is-in-a-lather-over-iconic-mysuru-brand/articleshow/128378314.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Sun, 15 Feb 2026 16:28:01 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>RAJEEV SINGH</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="83974" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-128380214,imgsize-83974.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA[Babar-Rizwan masterclass to 'Kohli goes down the ground': How Ind & Pak have fared in 2020s]]></title><description><![CDATA[India and Pakistan's T20 World Cup encounters have been closely contested, despite India's 7-1 head-to-head record. Recent matches in the 2020s, including the 2021 loss, the thrilling 2022 victory, and the tight 2024 win, highlight decisive moments rather than one-sided dominance.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/icc-mens-t20-world-cup/babar-azam-mohammad-rizwan-masterclass-to-kohli-goes-down-the-ground-how-india-pakistan-have-fared-in-t20-world-cups-in-2020s/articleshow/128378540.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/icc-mens-t20-world-cup/babar-azam-mohammad-rizwan-masterclass-to-kohli-goes-down-the-ground-how-india-pakistan-have-fared-in-t20-world-cups-in-2020s/articleshow/128378540.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Sun, 15 Feb 2026 15:26:58 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="34342" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-128378601,imgsize-34342.cms"/></item></channel></rss>
